components.name: content_completeness
components.rationale: Checks substantive copy, property/location context, configuration, audience, and policies.

components.name: amenity_coverage
components.rationale: Uses weighted universal and property-type amenity groups; alternatives satisfy a group once.

components.name: value_proposition
components.rationale: Rewards concrete facts, relevant features, guest benefits, and useful local context.

components.name: guest_clarity
components.rationale: Checks layout, arrival, transport, rules, and expectation-setting information.

components.name: trust_and_hygiene
components.rationale: Checks listed safety items, professional mechanics, disclosures, and off-platform signals.

components.name: title_relevance
components.rationale: Measures title length, property/location relevance, differentiators, and mechanics.

components.name: description_relevance
components.rationale: Measures useful search concepts in the description and opening summary.

components.name: search_breadth
components.rationale: Measures distinct amenity categories, local context, and lexical variety.

components.name: structure_and_hygiene
components.rationale: Rewards scannable structure and absence of keyword or punctuation spam.

components.name: skimmability
components.rationale: Rewards useful paragraphs, bullets, and descriptive headings.

components.name: mechanics
components.rationale: Checks capitalization, repeated punctuation, spacing, and sentence endings.

strengths: The copy clearly identifies both the property type and location.
Distinctive features are clearly listed: outdoor space, parking, workspace.
The submitted amenities cover most core connectivity and safety expectations.
The title and description provide strong content-discoverability signals.
weaknesses: The description is too short to answer common guest questions.
The description does not state verified guest capacity, a verified bedroom or bed layout, and a verified bathroom count.

missing_amenities.name: Laundry facilities
missing_amenities.reason: Not listed: Laundry details help guests evaluate longer and family stays. Verify that it is available before adding it to the listing.

recommended_improvements.recommendation: Expand the description to roughly 100 to 350 useful words covering layout, experience, arrival, and location.
recommended_improvements.rationale: The current copy does not provide enough evidence for a confident guest decision.

recommended_improvements.recommendation: State verified guest capacity, a verified bedroom or bed layout, and a verified bathroom count explicitly.
recommended_improvements.rationale: Concrete configuration details reduce ambiguity and improve search relevance.

recommended_improvements.recommendation: Use short paragraphs and descriptive sections for the space, amenities, access, and location.
recommended_improvements.rationale: Scannable structure helps guests find important details quickly.

better_descriptions: Welcome to a bright two-bedroom condo for four guests near Miami Beach. Enjoy the private balcony, fast Wi-Fi, dedicated workspace, full kitchen, and one bathroom. Self check-in makes arrival easy, and free parking is included. The building has stairs, and quiet hours begin at 10 PM. The property is located in Miami Beach, Miami, Florida, US. Included amenities: Wi-Fi, Kitchen, Dedicated workspace, Free parking, Smoke alarm, Carbon monoxide alarm, Fire extinguisher, First aid kit.

Make this condo your base for a stay in Miami. Welcome to a bright two-bedroom condo for four guests near Miami Beach. Enjoy the private balcony, fast Wi-Fi, dedicated workspace, full kitchen, and one bathroom. Self check-in makes arrival easy, and free parking is included. The building has stairs, and quiet hours begin at 10 PM. Included amenities: Wi-Fi, Kitchen, Dedicated workspace, Free parking, Smoke alarm, Carbon monoxide alarm, Fire extinguisher, First aid kit. Book with confidence after reviewing the complete listing details and policies.
